mnemonics.title: AND vs OR Node Rules
mnemonics.content: AND = ALL must succeed (think AND means Add all costs). OR = ONE is enough (think OR means Only one Required, pick the minimum cost).

mnemonics.title: AO* SOLVED Propagation
mnemonics.content: SOLVED rules follow the node type: AND node SOLVED when ALL children SOLVED. OR node SOLVED when ANY child SOLVED. Remember: AND=ALL, OR=ANY.

mnemonics.title: Solution Graph vs Solution Path
mnemonics.content: A*=Path, AO*=Graph. Standard search finds a PATH (single route). AND-OR search finds a GRAPH (tree of subproblem solutions). Think: the extra O in AO* stands for 'OR and AND together'.

mnemonics.title: Problem Reduction Steps
mnemonics.content: DeSoCo - Decompose (break into subproblems), Solve (solve each independently), Combine (merge solutions). Like cooking: chop ingredients, cook each separately, combine on plate.
